properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v2 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I had lived a life of sin in this world were living in I had done forbidden things I shouldn't do I ask a beggar along the way, u can tell me where to stay Where I'd find real happiness and love that's true

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Across the bridge, there's no more sorrow Across the bridge, theres' no more pain The Sun will shine across the river And you'll never be unhappy again

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: follow footsteps of the King and you'll hear the voices sing They'll be singing out the glory of the Lamb The river of Jordan will be near, the sound of trumpets you will hear You'll behold the sweetest voice ever known to man
